title: 有馬記念の後に・祭だ祭だわあっしょい

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(Watch me, everyone! Watch me shine like the
brightest fireworks show there's ever been!)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Rrraaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Inari One has taken the lead! Here she comes!
And it's Inari One!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: THE TOP! BELONGS! TO MEEE!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Inari One takes first place!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Racer with Purple Scrunchie
text_block_list.text:
She did it, she did it, she did it! Inari won! She
really, really won!

text_block_list.name: Townsman
text_block_list.text:
Three cheers for Japan's number one! Way to go,
Inari!

text_block_list.name: Townswoman
text_block_list.text:
Waaah! You're incredible, Inari! I'm so proud of
ya, dear!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
Heh. You cheeky lil' fool. Whaddaya think you're
doin' making me cry?

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text: This was a historic race. It was the race we've been dreaming of—the generation we've been dreaming of!

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
An incredible golden age where there's not one
winner standing above everyone, but where the
greatest racers all battle for victory and shine
together!

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
Inari One, you've finally done it. You've proven
that you're the fire that lights the way for your
generation!

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
But we can't keep it for ourselves! We must let the
tale of these brilliant stars be told for all of
history! Indeed, these Umamusume, they've—

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I... I won. I WON!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Whozza winner of the Arima Kinen?! I
AM!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: YEEEEAAHH!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Inariii!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations! I'm mad that I lost, but... you
won fair and square.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Besides, racing with you was such a blast!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Creek...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hey.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Today's race was fun—just like a festival.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Next time, I won't lose. But congratulations on
your win today.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...If anyone oughta be sayin' thanks, it's me.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm so lucky to be in the same generation as you
two.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(You can't put on a festival alone, after all! I
never would've been able to do this without these
amazing rivals.)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Let's do this again sometime. One day, we should
get together 'n' throw another festival, just as big
as the one we had today!

text_block_list.name: Oguri & Creek
text_block_list.text:
Sure.
Okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Inari! Inari! Inari! Inari!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Whatta sight...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Boss!
choice_data_list: You did it! You really did it!
You did it! You really did it!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Boss!
choice_data_list: You did it! You really did it!
You did it! You really did it!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I sure did! Geez, what're those teary eyes
for? You're gonna make me cry too!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But I finally did it. I set off the biggest fireworks
the world's ever seen.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Yeah! The two of us did, together!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Now then, time to set off one last firework!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: All right, people! Listen up!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm an Umamusume of humble beginnings. The Oi
races are where I started, and without them, I
wouldn't be here today!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
And likewise, if it wasn't for Tracen and all the
central racers here today, I could never have
made today's race as explosive as it was!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Y'know what that means? This Arima Kinen was
brimmin' with the fire of the central and regional
Umamusume! And that fire's what set off the
biggest fireworks in all of history!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
And the one shinin' bright in the middle of those
fireworks...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
...is none other than me, Inari One, the classy
Umamusume born 'n' raised with style in Oi! You'd
all better burn that into your brains!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: And lemme make one thing crystal clear!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whether they're in the regionals or centrals, all
Umamusume, all races—they're all equally the
greatest!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One stands at the zenith she's always
dreamed of, her bold declaration echoing
throughout Nakayama Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A short while later...

text_block_list.name: Townsman
text_block_list.text:
Raise your glasses, folks! This one's for the Pride
of Oi—Inari One, Umamusume of the Year!

text_block_list.name: Townspeople
text_block_list.text: Cheeeers!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'm grateful to you for preparin' such a big
ol' party, everybody! I really appreciate it!

text_block_list.name: Townswoman
text_block_list.text:
Quit it with the formal talk! As if we weren't all
jumpin' at the chance to throw a festival for one
of our own!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Well, when ya put it that way, I guess all I
can really do is say thanks!

text_block_list.name: Racer with Purple Scrunchie
text_block_list.text:
Inari, you were sooo awesome at the Arima Kinen!
I wanna be just like you someday—everybody
does!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Listen to that! You're gonna follow in my
footsteps, huh? I guess the good ol' Oi spirit
burns bright in us all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One is all smiles as she's surrounded by the
downtown folk she loves most. Just looking at her
makes my eyes brim with tears.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I must be really gettin' on in years. Now I'm all
soft—I start cryin' over the littlest things.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
But you're still young, so straighten your back 'n'
go have fun. Leave the tears for us old folk.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
Inari! Get over here! Don't leave your partner
hangin'!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, he pushes me forward toward Inari
One.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: What the—oh, hey, Boss. When'd ya run off?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: What the—oh, hey, Boss. When'd ya run off?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You're my one 'n' only partner, so you gotta stick
by my side! Got it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Beneath the clear blue sky, the grand festival
finally gets underway to celebrate Inari One's
ascent to the very top.
